category_sources: source_facts.description says Golang HTTP framework for microservices; official CloudWeGo Hertz docs describe Hertz as a Go HTTP framework and hz as its code generation tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hz; official CloudWeGo docs page title is "hz Code Generation" and says hz is the code generation tool provided by Hertz.
docs_sources: Official CloudWeGo docs cover Hertz and the hz toolkit, including install, basic usage, Thrift, Protobuf, layout, annotations, and commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/cloudwego/hertz; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official CloudWeGo docs say hz generates Hertz project scaffolding from Thrift and Protobuf IDL; source_facts.description identifies Golang HTTP framework for microservices.
